item.title: Slackpad
item.description: A macOS note-taking app that keeps notes as plain .txt files and posts to Slack as you write.

item.title: tfjson2hcl
item.description: A tool to convert heredoc JSON in Terraform files into jsonencode({...})

item.title: tfunfold
item.description: tfunfold is a tool to expand Terraform for_each / count into individual resources or modules with moved blocks.

item.title: gemcard
item.description: Cloudflare Workers app that turns RubyGems URLs into OGP-friendly links for X (Twitter) and Slack cards

item.title: vscode-tfrename
item.description: VS Code extension that renames Terraform resources via the tfrename CLI.

item.title: amzcard
item.description: Cloudflare Workers app that turns Amazon product URLs into OGP-friendly links for X (Twitter) cards

item.title: tfdsprune
item.description: tfdsprune is a tool to remove unused Terraform data source definitions.

item.title: tfquiet
item.description: Terraform plan output formatter to reduce noise

item.title: tfrename
item.description: Rename Terraform resources, data sources, modules, variables, outputs, and locals across .tf files

item.title: tflat
item.description: Flatten Terraform modules into the parent with moved blocks for state migration.

item.title: tflocalexpand
item.description: tflocalexpand is a tool to expand Terraform locals references into their underlying expressions.

item.title: iampd2j
item.description: Convert Terraform aws_iam_policy_document data sources to inline jsonencode() expressions

item.title: terraform-provider-iamencode
item.description: Terraform provider with user-defined functions that validate an IAM policy document

item.title: pgls-vscode
item.description: VSCode client for the pgls PostgreSQL language server.

item.title: pgls
item.description: A PostgreSQL language server. Provides completion, hover, and diagnostics for SQL — both inside .sql files and inside SQL string literals embedded in .go source.

item.title: myschema
item.description: Declarative schema management for MySQL.

item.title: TenkiMap
item.description: 気象庁の府県天気予報とAMeDAS観測値を地図上にオーバーレイ表示するiOSアプリ

item.title: psqlfmt
item.description: psqlfmt is a PostgreSQL SQL formatter.

item.title: udiff
item.description: Pure Ruby unified diff library. No external dependencies, no shelling out to diff.

item.title: SimpleResize
item.description: iOS向けのシンプルな画像リサイズアプリです。

item.title: terraform-provider-statuspage
item.description: Terraform provider for Statuspage.io.

item.title: orderedmap
item.description: A generic, thread-safe ordered map for Go that preserves insertion order using container/list.

item.title: pistachio
item.description: pistachio is a declarative schema management tool for PostgreSQL.

item.title: s3lock
item.description: s3lock is a locking command using S3.

item.title: HatebuFilter
item.description: 「はてブフィルター」は指定されたキーワードを含む はてなブックマーク (https://b.hatena.ne.jp/) のエントリを非表示にするSafari機能拡張です。

item.title: conds
item.description: go get github.com/winebarrel/conds

item.title: dbtyp
item.description: dbtyp is a library that associates types with *sql.DB

item.title: jsonast
item.description: jsonast is a library that parses JSON and converts it to AST.

item.title: json2go
item.description: json2go is a tool to convert JSON to Go struct.

item.title: dap
item.description: Digest authentication proxy that stores authentication information in a cookie.

item.title: kodama
item.description: kodama is a DNS server that returns any private IP address.

item.title: lastcmt
item.description: lastcmt is a CLI that comments on a pull request and minimizes previous comments.

item.title: qrev
item.description: qrev is a SQL execution history management tool.

item.title: sglob
item.description: sglob is a small globbing library for string.

item.title: kap
item.description: Simple HTTP proxy with Auth key.

item.title: gap
item.description: Simple HTTP proxy with Google Oauth2 access token verification.

item.title: terraform-provider-sleep
item.description: Terraform provider of the function to pause.

item.title: def2env
item.description: def2env is a tool that extracts environment variables from ECS task definitions and executes commands.

item.title: terraform-provider-multireplace
item.description: Terraform provider for multi-pattern string replacement

item.title: terraform-provider-firebaseremoteconfig
item.description: Terraform provider for Firebase Remote Config.

item.title: esub
item.description: A library to replace string placeholders with environment variables.

item.title: plsort
item.description: plsort is a tool that sorts YouTube playlist items in lexicographic order by title.

item.title: terraform-provider-googlesheets
item.description: Terraform provider for retrieving data from Google Sheets.

item.title: rdslog
item.description: rdslog is a tool to download RDS logs using the DownloadCompleteDBLogFile API.

item.title: terraform-provider-lambdaconfig
item.description: Terraform provider for AWS Lambda function concurrency configuration.

item.title: ssowrap
item.description: ssowrap is a single binary tool that run a command using AWS SSO credentials.

item.title: VerticalBattery
item.description: Small vertical battery icon on menu bar.

item.title: rdsauth
item.description: rdsauth is a tool to generate an auth token used to connect to a db with IAM credentials.

item.title: dbping
item.description: PING utility for databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL)

item.title: Pullse
item.description: Pullse is a utility app that notifies you of GitHub Pull Requests that have been approved or failed testing.
